footer.desc: Vietnamese culture localized economy RPG & AI Waifu Discord Bot.
footer.copyright: © {year} Waguri Bot. All rights reserved by the Waguri development team.

hero.subtitle: Experience a fun RPG world, work, career progression, high-stakes minigames, clans, and chat with sweet Waguri Kaoruko right on your Discord server!

features.title: Key Features
features.subtitle: Explore the unique pieces that make up the colorful world of Waguri
features.ai_chat_desc: Super smooth Gemini AI integration, remembers nicknames and automatically stores memories to make conversations sweet and personal.
features.economy_desc: Work system, unlock 13 professions, buy vehicles for travel, rank up, and upgrade Gekka Bakery to bake cakes for coins.
features.minigames_desc: Test your luck with Loto, Bingo, Dice, Fish-Prawn-Crab, and intense card games right inside your Discord server.
features.clans_desc: Form clans to grind, distribute clan dividends, manage Gekka Bakery together, and hire NPC staff to get rich collectively.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.a1: It's super simple! Just click the 'Invite Waguri to Discord' button, add the bot to your server, and type `/start` or `/help` for detailed instructions.
faq.q2: What is the daily check-in command?
faq.a2: Use `/daily` to get check-in coins every day. Checking in consecutively (streaks) will multiply your rewards significantly!
faq.q3: How does the AI chat feature work?
faq.a3: You can type `/ask <message>` or ping the bot directly in the chat channel. Waguri will automatically detect your language and reply sweetly.
faq.q4: How do I earn the most coins?
faq.a4: Use `/work` regularly, complete `/quest` daily, go `/fish` or `/mine` for ingredients, then bake them in `/tiembanh` to sell cakes for profit!
